what_it_does: Defines shared CSS for preview card framing: imports color/type tokens, resets page margins, sets body typography/colors/background, and provides card, row, grid, label, and mono utility classes.
observations: Resets html and body margin and padding to zero.
Body uses tokenized font, foreground color, canvas background, and antialiased font smoothing.
.card establishes padded full-width box sizing with min-height: 100%.
.card-row is a wrapping flex row with centered items and a 16px gap.
.card-grid is a grid container with a 16px gap.
.label uses uppercase small text with wide letter spacing and muted foreground color.
.mono uses the mono font token with 12px secondary foreground text.
standouts: Small shared stylesheet centered on preview card scaffolding and utility presentation classes.
Uses design tokens for typography and color rather than literal values.
Provides both layout utilities and text-style utilities in one file.
conventions: Uses CSS custom properties for theme values.
Uses low-specificity class selectors for reusable utilities.
Uses compact single-line rules for simple selectors.
Uses a file header comment naming the stylesheet role.
Uses @import to pull shared token definitions.
concerns: .card min-height: 100% depends on ancestor height being defined to have an effect.
@import can defer loading of dependent CSS compared with bundler-level or HTML-level stylesheet ordering.
notes: This file is the local preview card frame stylesheet, combining page defaults with a small set of reusable card layout and text utilities.
questions: What ancestor height context is expected for .card min-height: 100%?
Are .label and .mono intended only for preview cards or for broader design-system samples?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the contents: it provides a shared frame and supporting utility styles for design-system preview cards.
intention_signals: It seems intended to standardize the surrounding page and common card internals for design-system preview artifacts while delegating color and type values to shared tokens.
contribution: Contributes a portable preview-card styling layer: page reset, tokenized body defaults, padded card framing, row/grid layout helpers, and small label/monospace text treatments.
summary_for_embedding: Shared CSS preview-card frame defining tokenized body defaults, card padding, row/grid layout helpers, and label/mono text utility classes.
intention_for_embedding: This was for giving design-system preview cards a consistent local frame and reusable presentation primitives tied to shared color and typography tokens.
